title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built on Kimi K2.5 with 1T parameters and 256K context, enhanced through domain-focused continued pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning. The training pipeline includes auto-install capabilities, reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties, and self-summarization for handling context limits.
